title: Ring of Fire
why_this_song: Ring of Fire by Johnny Cash (1963) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "And it makes a fiery ring"
Appears 18 times; first heard in: "I fell into a ring of fire"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "And it burns, burns, burns"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I went down, down, down"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I fell into a ring of fire"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: The ring of fire, the ring of fire
I fell into a burnin' ring of fire
The ring of fire, the ring of fire
The taste of love is sweet

excerpts.text: And it makes a fiery ring
The taste of love is sweet

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Ring of Fire" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Ring of Fire" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
